title: achillea millefolium var. borealis
intro: Achillea millefolium var. borealis, commonly known as boreal yarrow, is a perennial herb plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the boreal regions of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of boreal yarrow include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support digestive health, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Boreal yarrow can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
